message:
perf(raptorq): pre-allocate chunk and ID vectors in from_payload

Use div_ceil to compute the expected chunk count upfront and pass it to
Vec::with_capacity for both the chunks and chunk_ids vectors. This avoids
repeated reallocations when chunking large payloads, which matters for
RaptorQ encoding of multi-MB objects where dozens of chunks are produced.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
